Name: Bodhigolla Wewa
Work description: 1. Dense planting of mixed vegetation comprising Kumbuk/Mee/ Godapara/Madan /Aththikka/Wal del/Kekuna /Mango/Guava/randomly mixed seedlings at 500 mm grid intervals for 500 m2. & Apply mulching, organic manure, and NPK fertilizer.
2. Introduction of Bamboo, Vetiver grass, and riparian plants. Covered area 400 m2. & Maintain for six months and continue watering for one year as required.
3. Excavate about 20m x 15m x 5m depth in RB side towards upstream to enhance the tank capacity
